name: meetings_invitation_get
description: Retrieve the meeting invitation text for a specific meeting. Returns the email-ready invitation with join URL and dial-in details.

body.invitation:
Jane Doe is inviting you to a scheduled Zoom meeting.

Topic: Weekly Team Sync
Time: Jan 15, 2024 10:00 AM Eastern Time

Join Zoom Meeting
https://zoom.us/j/1234567890

Meeting ID: 123 456 7890
Passcode: abc123
